notableEvents.label: Spencer Steer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Reds challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Spencer Steer grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Nathaniel Lowe out at 2nd. Spencer Steer out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Will Benson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Will Benson flies out to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr.

notableEvents.label: Bobby Witt Jr. plunked
notableEvents.detail: Bobby Witt Jr. hit by pitch. Carter Jensen to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas hits a grand slam (2) to left center field. Carter Jensen scores. Bobby Witt Jr. scores. Jac Caglianone scores.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Brandon Leibrandt on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Isbel GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Isbel grounds into a double play, second baseman Edwin Arroyo to shortstop Matt McLain to first baseman Nathaniel Lowe. Michael Massey out at 2nd. Kyle Isbel out at 1st.
